changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(mem): `better-sqlite3` dependency removed. Reverts the OpenCode SQLite reader added in 0.6.0-beta.3. Fixes `npm install -g @enpd/devflow@beta` failure when the prebuilt binary download fails and no local C toolchain is available.
- fix(mem): OpenCode platform degraded — `tl mem list / search / extract` on platform `opencode` returns empty + a one-shot stderr warning. Claude and Codex paths unchanged.
notes: Beta patch on top of 0.6.0-beta.3. Run `devflow update`.
